title: Timing and Synchronization Platform suitable for use in precision digitizers
author: Istituto Nazionale di Ricerca Metrologica (INRiM)
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Report on the development of a precision (< 50 ps jitter) timing solution for the ADC architectures with a galvanically isolated external trigger, lock-in and internal clock frequency output. This includes the development of the metrological tools to evaluate its performance and a comprehensive report on the jitter and synchronisation performance achieved.
steps_raw: Report on the development of a precision (< 50 ps jitter) timing solution for the ADC architectures with a galvanically isolated external trigger, lock-in and internal clock frequency output. This includes the development of the metrological tools to evaluate its performance and a comprehensive report on the jitter and synchronisation performance achieved.
